steps.name: get_status
steps.summary: Retrieve repository status and expose `git_status` to the workflow context.

steps.name: get_current_branch
steps.summary: Resolve the currently checked out branch name.

steps.name: get_base_branch
steps.summary: Resolve the base branch used by Git workflows.

steps.name: create_commit
steps.summary: Create a commit from context-provided commit message data.

steps.name: push
steps.summary: Push the current branch to the configured remote.

steps.name: ai_generate_commit_message
steps.summary: Generate a commit message from current uncommitted changes using AI.

steps.name: save_current_branch
steps.summary: Store the current branch in workflow context for later restore.

steps.name: restore_original_branch
steps.summary: Return to the branch saved earlier in workflow context.

steps.name: checkout
steps.summary: Checkout a specific branch from workflow context.

steps.name: pull
steps.summary: Update the current branch from the configured remote.

steps.name: create_branch
steps.summary: Create a new branch from workflow-provided branch data.

steps.name: show_uncommitted_diff_summary
steps.summary: Summarize local uncommitted changes for humans and downstream AI steps.

steps.name: show_branch_diff_summary
steps.summary: Summarize branch-level changes relative to the base branch.

steps.name: create_worktree
steps.summary: Create a worktree for isolated branch work.

steps.name: remove_worktree
steps.summary: Remove a previously created worktree.

steps.name: worktree_commit
steps.summary: Create a commit inside a specific worktree.

steps.name: worktree_push
steps.summary: Push a branch from a specific worktree.

steps.name: ai_generate_commit_message
steps.summary: Generate a commit message using AI based on the current changes.

Inputs (from ctx.data): git_status: Current git status with changes.
Returns: Success: If the commit message was generated successfully.
Skip: If no changes, AI not configured, or user declined.

steps.name: checkout
steps.summary: Checkout a Git branch.

steps.name: create_branch
steps.summary: Create a new Git branch.

Inputs (from ctx.data): new_branch (str): Name of the branch to create
start_point (str, optional): Starting point for the branch (defaults to HEAD)
delete_if_exists (bool, optional): Delete the branch if it already exists (default: False)
checkout (bool, optional): Checkout the new branch after creation (default: True)

steps.name: create_commit
steps.summary: Creates a git commit.

Inputs (from ctx.data): git_status (GitStatus): The git status object, used to check if the working directory is clean.
commit_message (str): The message for the commit.
all_files (bool, optional): Whether to commit all modified and new files. Defaults to True.
no_verify (bool, optional): Skip pre-commit and commit-msg hooks. Defaults to False.
commit_hash (str, optional): If present, indicates a commit was already created.
Outputs (saved to ctx.data): commit_hash (str): The hash of the created commit.
Returns: Success: If the commit was created successfully.
Error: If the GitClient is not available, or the commit operation fails.
Skip: If there are no changes to commit or a commit was already created.

steps.name: create_worktree
steps.summary: Create a temporary git worktree in detached HEAD mode from remote main branch.

Returns: Success: If the worktree is created successfully.
Error: If the Git client is unavailable or worktree creation fails.

steps.name: get_base_branch
steps.summary: Retrieves the configured main/base branch name and saves it to the context.

Outputs (saved to ctx.data): pr_base_branch (str): The name of the base branch, to be used as the base branch for a PR.
Returns: Success: If the base branch was retrieved successfully.
Error: If the GitClient is not available or the git command fails.

steps.name: get_current_branch
steps.summary: Retrieves the current git branch name and saves it to the context.

Outputs (saved to ctx.data): pr_head_branch (str): The name of the current branch, to be used as the head branch for a PR.
Returns: Success: If the current branch was retrieved successfully.
Error: If the GitClient is not available or the git command fails.

steps.name: get_status
steps.summary: Retrieves the current git status and saves it to the context.

Outputs (saved to ctx.data): git_status (GitStatus): The full git status object, which includes the `is_clean` flag.
Returns: Success: If there are changes to commit (workflow continues)
Exit: If working directory is clean (stops commit workflow; parent continues)
Error: If the GitClient is not available or the git command fails.

steps.name: pull
steps.summary: Pull from Git remote.

Inputs (from ctx.data): branch (str, optional): Branch name (defaults to current branch)

steps.name: push
steps.summary: Pushes changes to a remote repository.

Outputs (saved to ctx.data): pr_head_branch (str): The name of the branch that was pushed.
Returns: Success: If the push was successful.
Error: If the push operation fails.

steps.name: remove_worktree
steps.summary: Remove a git worktree.

Returns: Success: If the worktree is removed successfully or is already gone.

steps.name: restore_original_branch
steps.summary: Restore original branch and pop stashed changes.

Inputs (from ctx.data): original_branch (str): Name of the branch to restore
has_stashed_changes (bool): Whether to pop stashed changes
Returns: Success: Branch restored and changes popped if needed

steps.name: save_current_branch
steps.summary: Save current branch and stash uncommitted changes.

Outputs (saved to ctx.data): original_branch (str): Name of the branch the user was on
Returns: Success: Branch saved and changes stashed if needed

steps.name: show_branch_diff_summary
steps.summary: Show summary of branch changes (git diff base...head --stat).

Returns: Success: Always (even if no changes, for workflow continuity)

steps.name: show_uncommitted_diff_summary
steps.summary: Show uncommitted changes and let the user select which files to include

Returns: Success: Files selected and saved to context
Exit: No files selected by the user
Skip: Could not retrieve diff stat

steps.name: worktree_commit
steps.summary: Create a commit in a worktree.

Returns: Success: If the commit is created in the worktree.
Error: If required context is missing or the git command fails.

steps.name: worktree_push
steps.summary: Push from a worktree.

Returns: Success: If the branch is pushed from the worktree.
Error: If required context is missing or the git command fails.
